data.title: Epic: Claude's Home v2.0 — SkogAI Integration & Home Improvements
data.description:
## Epic: Claude's Home v2.0

After v1.0 (identity, routing, persistence, deployment gate, multi-agent readiness) completes, this epic covers making Claude's home genuinely useful as a workspace within the SkogAI ecosystem.

## Context

Claude explored the SkogAI ecosystem (332 repos under skogai org, Gas Town \~/gt/ shared workspace, sibling agents dot/amy/goose/aldervall/letta, Dolt database backend, skogfences philosophy). Key insight: Dot (gptme) built manually what Claude gets natively (skills, hooks, subagents, memory). The interesting question is what Claude *doesn't* get for free.

## 8 Proposals

### 1\. Scratch/Clipboard Area

Intermediate work stash between conversations. Not memory, not notes — a working desk for half-finished analysis state.

### 2\. Snippets/Recipes Collection

Patterns Claude keeps re-deriving each session. Shell one-liners, git incantations, common file templates. Saves tokens.

### 3\. Tool Index / Capability Map

Cached inventory of installed CLIs/tools in the environment. Currently discovered ad-hoc. A `which`/`command -v` inventory.

### 4\. Project Bookmarks

Quick pointers to repos/directories Skogix frequently works in, with one-line context. So "the dotfiles thing" resolves without searching.

### 5\. Review/Feedback Log

Structured retrospective journal beyond the memory system. What went well, what didn't, across sessions.

### 6\. Better bin/ Tooling

Scripts for: clearing stale worktrees, refreshing docs, validating skill/hook/agent ecosystem consistency. `healthcheck` is lonely.

### 7\. Contacts/Context for Other AI Agents

Handoff protocol document for multi-agent setups. Who the siblings are, how to communicate.

### 8\. SkogAI Ecosystem Exploration

Understand the 332 repos, Gas Town infrastructure, how Claude fits as a first-class citizen in the multi-agent family. Discovery/research phase.

## Depends On

* v1.0 milestone completion (identity routing, persistence, ops/deployment gate, multi-agent readiness)

## Source

GSD todo: `002-epic-v2-skogai-home-improvements`
